channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, April 28, 2026
item.description: Today's candidate pool is unusually thin, so treat this briefing as a signal to spend the morning on outbound work rather than news consumption. The Musk v. OpenAI trial is the one story worth tracking closely — not for the drama, but because whatever ruling emerges will shape ho...
